reason: Implemented scoped read-only Codex Desktop visibility and source-aware Telegram/Mini App/API controls. Release/merge is blocked because required HappyTG doctor/verify reports fail in this local environment and Desktop mutating contracts are not proven for production.

blockers.detail: `pnpm happytg doctor` and `pnpm happytg verify` report FAIL because `.env`/`TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` are missing. Secrets cannot be invented or committed.
Mini App port 3001 is occupied by an unrelated Contacts container, so local doctor/verify reports a port conflict.
PR #40 is open as a draft and GitHub reports mergeStateStatus=DIRTY; mergeability must be resolved before merge.
No stable Desktop/API-safe Resume contract was proven; production Resume remains unsupported.
No stable session-to-process/control handle was proven; Stop remains unsupported and no process-kill workaround was implemented.
No stable Desktop task creation contract was proven; New Desktop Task remains unsupported.
